description: Value contingent claims — binomial model (one- and two-period), BSM assumptions and formula, carry benefits, Black model for futures/swaptions, option Greeks, implied volatility

no_arbitrage_principles.put_call_parity: C − P = S − PV(X); holds under no-arbitrage
no_arbitrage_principles.bounds: Call: max(0, S−PV(X)); Put: max(0, PV(X)−S)

binomial_one_period.replication: Portfolio of stock + bond that replicates option payoff

two_period_binomial.backward_induction: Work from terminal nodes back to today

interest_rate_options.cap_floor: Series of caplets/floorlets; reference vs strike
interest_rate_options.multiperiod_binomial: Rate tree; each node computes caplet payoff

carry_benefits_extension.dividends: Replace S with S × e^{−qT}; lowers call, raises put
carry_benefits_extension.fx_options: Foreign risk-free rate acts as carry yield

black_model.swaption: Receiver/payer swaption valued on forward swap rate

implied_volatility.definition: σ that equates BSM price to market price
implied_volatility.vol_smile: Lower/higher strikes often imply higher vol
implied_volatility.vol_skew: Equity smirk: OTM puts rich relative to model

value_option.description: Value contingent claim using selected model

errors.message: model_type must be one of the supported option models

anti_patterns.rule: Do not use BSM without checking its assumptions against the market
anti_patterns.why: BSM assumes constant vol and lognormal returns; fat tails and volatility clustering cause systematic mispricing of far OTM options — use implied vol smile

anti_patterns.rule: Do not delta-hedge without monitoring gamma
anti_patterns.why: Delta hedges are instantaneously correct but drift as S moves; large gamma means rapid delta change — rebalancing frequency must scale with gamma exposure

anti_patterns.rule: Do not value swaptions with the standard BSM without switching to the Black model
anti_patterns.why: BSM uses spot price as input; swaptions are exercised into swap contracts best modelled with forward swap rates — the Black model is the correct framework
